sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69313" key="muristiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠρ-ιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n69313.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fragrant</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κάρυον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:131" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.131</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μυριστικά, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(3).89</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
